title: Validate all user inputs
All inputs must be validated on both client and server side
solution: Use strict validation rules and whitelist approach

title: Sanitize output data
description: All outputs must be sanitized before rendering

title: Validate file uploads
description: Files uploaded by users must be checked for type and size
solution: Allow only specific types and scan content

title: Limit input length
description: User inputs must have a maximum allowed length
solution: Implement length checks and input trimming

title: Use parameterized queries
description: Prevent SQL injection by using parameterized statements
solution: Use prepared statements or ORM frameworks

title: Validate JSON/XML inputs
description: Ensure structured inputs conform to schema
solution: Validate against JSON Schema or XSD

title: Check for special characters
description: Inputs must not contain malicious characters

title: Validate numeric ranges
description: Numbers must fall within expected ranges

title: Protect against URL injection
description: Validate all user-controlled URLs

title: Validate email format
description: Email fields must conform to RFC standards

title: Prevent command injection
description: Do not pass user input directly to system commands
solution: Use safe APIs, avoid shell commands

title: Prevent buffer overflow
description: Limit input size to prevent memory issues

title: Sanitize rich text inputs
description: Prevent malicious HTML in text editors

title: Prevent path traversal
description: Validate file paths to avoid access to sensitive files
solution: Use safe path APIs and sanitize input

title: Reject unexpected content types
description: Ensure that only expected content types are accepted

title: Validate date/time inputs
description: Ensure date fields are valid and reasonable
solution: Use standard date parsers and range checks

title: Validate boolean fields
description: Ensure boolean inputs are true/false or 0/1

title: Check for duplicate fields
description: Prevent repeated parameters to avoid confusion

title: Validate numeric precision
description: Ensure decimal numbers conform to expected precision

title: Validate IP addresses
description: Ensure IP inputs are valid IPv4 or IPv6 addresses

title: Validate URLs
description: Check that URL inputs are correctly formed

title: Check for SQL keywords
description: Prevent SQL injection by filtering reserved words

title: Prevent HTML injection
description: All HTML inputs must be sanitized

title: Limit special characters
description: Restrict use of certain special characters in inputs

title: Check JSON depth
description: Prevent excessively deep JSON structures

title: Validate decimal ranges
description: Ensure decimal numbers are within allowed min/max

title: Check array sizes
description: Validate array lengths before processing

title: Prevent injection in config files
description: Do not allow user input in configuration files

title: Secure password storage
description: Passwords must be hashed with a strong algorithm

title: Enforce password complexity
description: Passwords must include upper/lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols

title: Multi-factor authentication
description: Use 2FA or MFA for sensitive operations

title: Account lockout after failed attempts
description: Prevent brute-force attacks
solution: Lock account after multiple failed logins

title: Do not expose passwords in logs
description: Never log passwords or secrets
solution: Mask or omit sensitive data in logs

title: Secure password recovery
description: Recovery mechanisms must be safe and unique

title: Do not allow default passwords
description: All default credentials must be changed
solution: Force password change on first login

title: Avoid password reuse
description: Prevent users from reusing old passwords

title: Secure session tokens
description: Use unpredictable session tokens
solution: Generate tokens with cryptographically secure RNG

title: Set secure cookie flags
description: Use HttpOnly and Secure flags for session cookies

title: Invalidate session on logout
description: Ensure session is terminated

title: Implement idle session timeout
description: Automatic logout after inactivity

title: Do not expose authentication endpoints
description: Limit access to login API or page

title: Prevent username enumeration
description: Responses should not reveal valid usernames

title: Use HTTPS for login
description: All authentication must occur over TLS

title: Limit authentication attempts per IP
description: Reduce brute-force risk per IP

title: Use strong password hashing parameters
description: Apply appropriate cost factor in bcrypt/Argon2
solution: Adjust hash parameters for strong protection

title: Do not store plaintext secrets
description: Never store passwords or tokens in plaintext

title: Secure remember-me functionality
description: Tokens for 'remember me' must be secure

title: Implement CAPTCHA on login
description: Prevent automated login attempts

title: Do not rely on security questions
description: Questions can be guessed or leaked

title: Monitor failed login attempts
description: Detect unusual authentication patterns
solution: Log and alert on multiple failures

title: Secure third-party auth tokens
description: Tokens from OAuth/OpenID must be verified

title: Invalidate tokens on password change
description: Old tokens must be revoked

title: Do not expose password hints
description: Hints reveal too much info

title: Enforce account verification
description: New accounts must verify email/phone

title: Secure token storage on client
description: Do not store tokens insecurely in browser storage

title: Use time-limited tokens
description: Authentication tokens must expire

title: Detect credential stuffing
description: Monitor for repeated use of leaked credentials

title: Do not expose internal auth mechanisms
description: Internal methods should not be accessible externally
solution: Restrict access to internal auth APIs

title: Use secure cookies
description: All session cookies must have HttpOnly and Secure flags
solution: Set cookies with Secure and HttpOnly flags

title: Session timeout
description: Sessions must expire after inactivity

title: Invalidate session on logout
description: Sessions must be invalidated after logout

title: Regenerate session ID
description: Regenerate session ID after authentication
solution: Use new session IDs after login

title: Avoid session in URL
description: Never pass session IDs in URL parameters

title: Limit concurrent sessions
description: Restrict number of simultaneous sessions per user
solution: Track sessions and deny extra logins

title: Secure token storage
description: Do not store session tokens in local storage

title: Session expiration on password change
description: Invalidate all sessions when password changes

title: Monitor session activity
description: Track unusual session behavior

title: Prevent session fixation
description: Do not allow attackers to set session ID

title: Set session cookie path
description: Restrict cookie path to application scope

title: Set SameSite cookie flag
description: Prevent cross-site request forgery

title: Use strong session IDs
description: Session identifiers must be unpredictable

title: Avoid storing sensitive data in session
description: Do not store passwords or secrets in session
solution: Store minimal info and encrypt if needed

title: Implement session renewal
description: Refresh session periodically

title: Secure logout endpoint
description: Ensure logout cannot be bypassed

title: Do not share sessions across domains
description: Avoid using same session for multiple domains

title: Encrypt session data at rest
description: Store session data encrypted on server

title: Implement idle timeout warning
description: Warn users before session expires

title: Restrict session to IP address
description: Optionally bind session to user IP

title: Restrict session to user agent
description: Bind session to browser user-agent

title: Implement session heartbeat
description: Keep session alive securely
solution: Use AJAX heartbeat with token renewal

title: Check session integrity
description: Ensure session data is not tampered

title: Do not expose session ID in logs
description: Avoid logging session identifiers
solution: Mask or omit IDs in logs

title: Use HTTPS for all session traffic
description: Prevent session sniffing

title: Revoke sessions on suspicious activity
description: Detect anomalies and revoke sessions

title: Implement session concurrency control
description: Limit multiple concurrent logins

title: Secure session backup
description: Encrypt backup of session storage

title: Implement role-based access control
description: Access should be based on user roles

title: Enforce least privilege
description: Users should have minimum permissions

title: Deny by default
description: Default access should be denied

title: Secure admin functions
description: Admin pages require proper authentication

title: Enforce object-level access control
description: Control access to individual resources

title: Implement time-based restrictions
description: Restrict access based on time or session

title: Prevent privilege escalation
description: Users should not gain higher privileges

title: Check access on each request
description: Do not rely on front-end enforcement only

title: Secure API endpoints
description: APIs must enforce access control

title: Audit access control policies
description: Regularly review and test ACLs

title: Implement multi-level access checks
description: Check both user and resource constraints
solution: Combine role, ownership, and attribute checks

title: Avoid hard-coded access rules
description: Do not embed permissions in code

title: Secure file access
description: Control access to files and directories

title: Validate user input for access control
description: Avoid bypassing ACLs via input tampering

title: Prevent horizontal privilege escalation
description: Users cannot access peers' data

title: Prevent vertical privilege escalation
description: Users cannot access admin functions

title: Protect sensitive functions
description: Critical actions require extra checks

title: Implement attribute-based access control
description: Use user attributes for dynamic control

title: Use ACLs for resources
description: Define access control lists per object

title: Test access control enforcement
description: Check that ACLs work correctly

title: Protect service endpoints
description: APIs must enforce access control

title: Implement scope-based access
description: Limit API keys or tokens to scope

title: Avoid insecure direct object references
description: Do not expose IDs without checking access

title: Restrict access based on IP
description: Optionally limit access to trusted IPs

title: Protect admin interfaces
description: Only admins can reach admin dashboards

title: Centralize access control logic
description: Do not scatter checks in code

title: Log access control failures
description: Record failed attempts to access resources

title: Review access control rules periodically
description: Update roles and permissions regularly

title: Use access tokens with expiry
description: Do not allow infinite access tokens

title: Secure sharing features
description: Ensure shared resources honor ACLs
solution: Check access on every shared object

title: Use key stretching for passwords
description: Increase complexity of stored passwords using PBKDF2 or bcrypt

title: Do not use custom crypto
description: Avoid writing your own cryptographic functions

title: Secure key exchange
description: Use safe protocols for exchanging keys

title: Protect private keys
description: Private keys must never be exposed

title: Rotate keys regularly
description: Change encryption keys periodically

title: Use authenticated encryption
description: Encrypt and authenticate data together

title: Verify message integrity
description: Use checksums or digital signatures to prevent tampering

title: Use strong cipher modes
description: Avoid ECB mode, use CBC or GCM

title: Securely delete keys
description: Remove keys from memory after use

title: Use approved cryptography libraries
description: Avoid outdated libraries

title: Do not expose secrets in logs
description: Never log keys or passwords

title: Validate crypto configurations
description: Ensure strong key sizes and algorithms are used

title: Encrypt sensitive environment variables
description: Secrets in env files must be encrypted

title: Use secure random salts
description: Salts for hashing must be random

title: Separate encryption keys per context
description: Do not reuse keys for different purposes

title: Use strong hash algorithms
description: SHA-256 or better for non-password hashes

title: Secure random token generation
description: Use cryptographically secure RNG for tokens

title: Disable unnecessary services
description: Turn off default services that are not needed

description: Default configuration must be secure

title: Keep software updated
description: Apply patches regularly

description: Limit configuration access to admins only

description: Change all factory default credentials

description: Limit access to configuration files

description: Do not allow unsafe configuration changes via input
